zh.Leighton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾麗頓 白 內斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Domville於1366年出生在英國爾時，她的父親John Domville44歲，母親Cecily Mobberley43歲。她於1386年與Henry de Torbok結婚。她去世於1443年在英國爾拉比享年77歲，埋葬在英國爾拉比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Domville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dumville
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Donville (Calvados).  See also  Dumbell  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Domville was born in 1366, in Cheshire, England, her father, John Domville, was 44 and her mother, Cecily Mobberley, was 43. She married Henry de Torbok in 1386. She died in 1443, in Raby, Cheshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Raby, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Domville est née en 1366, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Domville, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Cecily Mobberley, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Torbok en 1386. Elle est décédée en 1443, à Raby, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Raby, Cheshire, Angleterre.

ko.Leighton, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Domville(이)가 1366년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Domville(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily Mobberley(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1386년 Henry de Torbok(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1443년 영국 체실르 라비에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 라비에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Domville родилась в 1366 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Domville было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily Mobberley, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Torbok в 1386 г. Она умерла в 1443 г. в местности раби, чешир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности раби, чешир, Англия.
